'''Nabkess''' was an [[Ortolan/Legends|Ortolan]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who crewed aboard the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Isilia]]'' under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Adriav Kavos]].
